name: Ham and Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crust and spread butter on one side of the bread.
2. Layer half of the bread in a 9x13 inch pan, buttered side down.
3. Sprinkle ham, cheese, and bell pepper over the bread.
4. Top with the remaining bread slices, also buttered side down.
5. Whisk eggs, milk, and salt together; pour evenly over the bread layers.
6. Cover with aluminum foil and refrigerate for at least 8 hours (overnight is best).
7. Remove from the refrigerator and let stand for about 1 hour before serving.
8. Crush the cornflakes and sprinkle them over the top of the casserole.
9. Melt butter and pour it over the crushed cornflakes.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 60 minutes, or until set.
